mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS projectId, project_name AS projectName FROM simulation_project ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT excavator_id AS excavatorId, position_x AS positionX, position_y AS positionY, position_z AS positionZ, body_rotation AS bodyRotation, swing_angle AS swingAngle, boom_angle AS boomAngle, arm_angle AS armAngle, bucket_angle AS bucketAngle, operation_mode AS operationMode, soil_in_bucket AS soilInBucket, selected_machine_id AS selectedMachineId, height_map_data AS heightMapData FROM simulation_state WHERE excavator_id = #{excavatorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_state ( excavator_id, position_x, position_y, position_z, body_rotation, swing_angle, boom_angle, arm_angle, bucket_angle, operation_mode, soil_in_bucket, selected_machine_id, height_map_data ) VALUES ( #{excavatorId}, #{positionX}, #{positionY}, #{positionZ}, #{bodyRotation}, #{swingAngle}, #{boomAngle}, #{armAngle}, #{bucketAngle}, #{operationMode}, #{soilInBucket}, #{selectedMachineId}, #{heightMapData} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE position_x = VALUES(position_x), position_y = VALUES(position_y), position_z = VALUES(position_z), body_rotation = VALUES(body_rotation), swing_angle = VALUES(swing_angle), boom_angle = VALUES(boom_angle), arm_angle = VALUES(arm_angle), bucket_angle = VALUES(bucket_angle), operation_mode = VALUES(operation_mode), soil_in_bucket = VALUES(soil_in_bucket), selected_machine_id = VALUES(selected_machine_id), height_map_data = VALUES(height_map_data)
